message:
feat(core,mvcc,wal,vdbe): add RuntimeContext/Region architecture, expand conformance tests, and harden cross-crate correctness

Major architectural additions and correctness improvements across the crate graph:

Core (fsqlite-core):
- Introduce RuntimeContext with process-global lifecycle management, IoPollStrategy,
  and RuntimeConfig for coordinating background services
- Add Region/RegionTree integration for structured resource scoping
- Import CancelReason from Cx for cooperative cancellation support
- Expand connection.rs with 490+ lines of new runtime infrastructure

Conformance Testing:
- Add 4100+ lines of new conformance_oracle_s55 tests covering PRAGMA table_info
  PK position, multicolumn UNIQUE constraints, and additional SQL edge cases
- Update conformance_oracle_ext tests with expanded coverage

MVCC Subsystem:
- Refine conflict_model with improved serialization conflict detection
- Minor correctness fixes across flat_combining, gc, lifecycle, observability,
  rcu, rowid_alloc, and write_coordinator modules

Other Crates:
- fsqlite-error: Add new error variants for runtime context failures
- fsqlite-ext-misc: Minor extension loading adjustments
- fsqlite-observability: Refine metric collection hooks
- fsqlite-pager: Improve arc_cache and s3_fifo eviction policies
- fsqlite-types: Enhance sync_primitives with additional atomic helpers
- fsqlite-vdbe: Expand engine with refined opcode handling
- fsqlite-wal: Improve group_commit, native_commit, and per_core_buffer
- fsqlite-wasm: Adjust WASM bindings for new runtime context API
- fsqlite (root): Update lib.rs with new re-exports and initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
